item.title: When is the next results date for Kwality Wall's?
item.description: Kwality Wall's will announce its results on March 6, 2026. Time: Mar 04 2026 11:16 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for RRP Defense Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for RRP Defense Ltd is March 6, 2026. Time: Mar 04 2026 11:16 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Elitecon International Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Elitecon International Ltd is March 7, 2026. Time: Mar 04 2026 11:16 PM IST

item.title: SBI Added to Mojo Stocks List Following Strong Q4 Financials and Bullish Momentum
item.description: State Bank of India (SBI), India’s largest public sector bank, has been added to the prestigious Mojo Stocks list as of 4 March 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and renewed bullish momentum. The inclusion marks a significant endorsement of SBI’s improving fundamentals, operational efficiency, and growth prospects, positioning it as a compelling investment opportunity within the large-cap banking sector. Time: Mar 04 2026 08:50 PM IST

item.title: Are SGL Resources Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: SGL Resources Ltd's latest Q3 FY26 results are poor, showing negative net sales of ₹-8.27 crores and a net profit loss of ₹-0.40 crores, indicating severe operational challenges and a need for immediate restructuring. The company's performance has drastically declined compared to the previous quarter and year, raising concerns about its viability. Time: Mar 04 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Laxmi Dental Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.179.45
item.description: Laxmi Dental Ltd, a player in the Healthcare Services sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.179.45 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market pressures and sectoral underperformance. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:50 PM IST

item.title: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 63
item.description: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd’s shares declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.63 on 4 Mar 2026, marking a significant price level for the stock amid broader market weakness and company-specific factors. The stock’s performance has been under pressure, reflecting a combination of subdued financial metrics and market dynamics. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:47 PM IST

item.title: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.56.05 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader sectoral and market pressures. The stock has underperformed the Hotels & Resorts sector and the wider market, reflecting a challenging period for the company. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:46 PM IST

item.title: Shri Keshav Cements & Infra Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Shri Keshav Cements & Infra Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a prolonged bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and heightened downside risks for the micro-cap cement company. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Uravi Defence & Technology Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Uravi Defence & Technology Ltd’s shares declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.131.55 on 4 March 2026, marking a significant drop amid broader sectoral and market pressures. The stock’s recent performance reflects ongoing concerns about its financial health and valuation metrics within the Auto Components & Equipments industry. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:07 PM IST

item.title: Zodiac Energy Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Zodiac Energy Ltd’s shares have declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 220.05, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. The stock’s recent performance reflects a series of challenges and market pressures that have weighed on investor sentiment and valuation metrics. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:07 PM IST

item.title: D.P. Abhushan Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Sector Downturn
item.description: Shares of D.P. Abhushan Ltd have declined sharply, touching a new 52-week low at Rs 1,056.05, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s recent performance. The stock closed just 1.05% above this low, reflecting sustained downward pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:07 PM IST

item.title: M K Proteins Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.4.45
item.description: M K Proteins Ltd, a player in the edible oil sector, recorded a new 52-week low of Rs.4.45 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market pressures and sectoral headwinds. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:06 PM IST

item.title: Popular Estate Management Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Shares of Popular Estate Management Ltd, a player in the construction sector, declined sharply to hit a new 52-week low of Rs.14.52 today, marking a significant downturn amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:06 PM IST

item.title: Wires & Fabriks (S.A) Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: Wires & Fabriks (S.A) Ltd touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.141.5 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader sectoral weakness and subdued market conditions. The stock underperformed the Garments & Apparels sector, reflecting ongoing pressures on the company’s financial metrics and valuation. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:06 PM IST

item.title: IKIO Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: IKIO Technologies Ltd, a player in the Electronics & Appliances sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.133.45, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a sustained downward trend over recent sessions. Time: Mar 04 2026 06:03 PM IST
